title: Raccoon Removal in Borough Park, Brooklyn | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Borough Park, Brooklyn. Licensed experts handle humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons in Borough Park are increasingly finding their way into attics, crawl spaces, and commercial properties throughout this densely populated Brooklyn neighborhood. With its mix of multi-family homes, brick rowhouses, and local businesses along 13th Avenue and New Utrecht Avenue, Borough Park presents unique challenges for wildlife intrusion. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, humane, and effective raccoon removal services tailored to the specific needs of Borough Park residents and business owners.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has extensive experience serving Borough Park's diverse community with culturally sensitive, professional pest control services. Our licensed technicians understand the urgency of wildlife removal in this tight-knit neighborhood and offer same-day service, humane trapping methods, and comprehensive exclusion work to prevent future raccoon problems.
localContext: Borough Park's closely spaced homes and mature trees along residential streets create ideal conditions for raccoons seeking shelter and food sources. From the busy commercial corridors near the 18th Avenue subway station to the quiet residential blocks with shared yards and alleyways, our team knows how to navigate the neighborhood efficiently and discreetly address your raccoon problem.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Borough Park?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Borough Park typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of entry points, and extent of damage. A single raccoon in an accessible attic may cost around $900–$1,500, while a family of raccoons with extensive damage and multiple entry points can reach $3,000–$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Borough Park, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Borough Park due to the abundance of food sources from residential garbage, the neighborhood's mature trees, and plenty of shelter opportunities in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. The dense housing and proximity to Prospect Park also contribute to raccoon activity. We see frequent calls from homes along side streets and multi-family properties where raccoons access roofs via nearby trees or utility lines.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Borough Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Borough Park for urgent raccoon situations. Initial trapping can begin immediately, though complete removal typically takes 3–7 days depending on the number of animals and their behavior. If baby raccoons are present (common in spring), we use specialized humane methods to ensure the entire family is safely removed before sealing entry points.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in Borough Park homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC provides complete raccoon damage restoration including insulation replacement, contaminated material removal, sanitization, odor elimination, and structural repairs to fascia boards, soffits, vents, and roof sections. We also perform professional exclusion work to seal all entry points with durable materials that prevent future wildlife intrusion, which is especially important in Borough Park's older housing stock.
